data.subject: Engagement for Due Diligence Services
data.introduction: We are pleased to confirm our engagement with Company Name (Client) to provide due diligence services in connection with the proposed investment / transaction.
scope_of_services: Review of corporate and secretarial records
Review of financial information and key agreements
Identification of material risks and compliance gaps
Preparation of due diligence report highlighting key observations
Scope may be refined based on discussions and information availability
deliverables: Due Diligence Report summarizing key findings, risks, and recommendations
data.timelines: Completion within 4 weeks from receipt of all relevant documents

fees.payment_terms: 50% upfront and balance upon submission of report / as agreed

client_responsibilities: Provide timely access to documents and information
Ensure accuracy and completeness of data
Facilitate coordination with target entity if required
data.confidentiality: Both parties shall maintain strict confidentiality and not disclose information without prior consent unless required by law.
data.limitation_of_liability: Liability limited to fees received. No guarantee or assurance of transaction outcomes.
data.termination: Either party may terminate with 7/15 days written notice. Fees for work completed shall be payable.
data.governing_law: Laws of India; jurisdiction: Delhi courts
